accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and verified context: the CRA authority, DOE rule, Federal Register citation/date, and legislative dates are correct.

no_hallucinations.why: Added context (Congressional Review Act name, 'tankless' descriptor, CRA never-took-effect treatment) is accurate and verifiable, not fabricated.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution disapproves and nullifies the DOE rule under the CRA.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly explains the resolution nullifies the identified DOE regulation so it has no force or effect.

exceptions_conditions.why: A CRA disapproval resolution contains no material exceptions or carve-outs to summarize.

effective_dates.why: Accurately states House passage (Feb. 27, 2025), Senate passage (Apr. 9-10, 2025), and approval (May 9, 2025).

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the sole operative effect—disapproval and nullification of the named rule under the CRA.

objective_tone.why: Neutral and factual, with no advocacy or editorializing.

concise.why: Free of padding and repetition while complete.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the Department of Energy, the Congressional Review Act, and the specific rule title.

correct_figures.why: Federal Register citation (89 Fed. Reg. 105188, Dec. 26, 2024) and all dates are accurate.
